base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_clear_orb — a pickup_item from 1986 castlevania. drops at end of each stage after boss defeat. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame glowing orb — drops at end of each stage after boss defeat; rotates through palette colors. Pickup triggers stage-clear fanfare
